_comment: Type-checks the contract TEST files together with src (the package build tsconfig.json EXCLUDES *.test.ts so its emitted dist stays test-free). noEmit + composite:false because this is a pure type-assertion gate, not a build input. Wired into the root `typecheck`/`gate` so the contract tests' type-level assertions are actually enforced (resolves the P0.5 flag).
